steps.title: Name an example of the genre
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of an epistolary novel. A successful sentence must name a specific novel and clearly identify it as epistolary. The notes also explain why the example fits: the novel consists primarily of letters, which are one kind of fictional document used in epistolary novels.

steps.title: Require title and category
steps.content:
• Choice A - In 2019, American author Mina Tran published a novel of letters sent from a young man named Little Dog to his mother, Rose.: This describes a letter-based novel but never identifies it as epistolary.
  • Choice C - It was Mina Tran who published the novel On Earth We're Briefly Gorgeous in 2019.: This gives publication information but says nothing about the genre or format.
  • Choice D - An epistolary novel is a novel written primarily as a series of fictional documents, such as letters, journal entries, or newspaper clippings.: This defines the term but does not provide a specific example.
The choice must both name the novel and label it as epistolary. The answer is B.
